---
created: "2026-03-22T00:00:00Z"
id: task-sv0c-project-setup
key: sv0c-project-setup
state: done
tags:
    - sv0
    - sv0c
    - setup
title: "sv0c project scaffolding and SML/NJ build system"
type: task
---

# sv0c project scaffolding and SML/NJ build system

## purpose

set up the SML/NJ project structure for sv0c, including:
- CM (Compilation Manager) build files for each module
- the main entry point that wires all passes together
- a test harness for running unit tests
- build scripts for compiling and running the compiler

## dependencies

/require: sml
/require: bash

## configuration

/env: SV0C_ROOT=sv0c
/env: SRC_DIR=sv0c/sml

## step 1: SML/NJ project structure

/ai: design the SML/NJ project structure for sv0c using CM (Compilation
     Manager) .cm files. the structure should support:
     - independent compilation of each compiler pass
     - a top-level sources.cm that ties everything together
     - separate test .cm files for unit testing
     - clean module boundaries using SML signatures and structures

     the directory layout should be:
     sv0c/
     ├── sources.cm              (top-level CM file)
     ├── src/
     │   ├── main.sml            (entry point: read file, run pipeline, emit C)
     │   ├── lexer/
     │   │   ├── sources.cm
     │   │   ├── token.sml       (Token datatype)
     │   │   └── lexer.sml       (Lexer structure)
     │   ├── ast/
     │   │   ├── sources.cm
     │   │   └── ast.sml         (AST datatypes)
     │   ├── parser/
     │   │   ├── sources.cm
     │   │   └── parser.sml      (Parser structure)
     │   ├── name_resolution/
     │   │   ├── sources.cm
     │   │   └── resolver.sml
     │   ├── type_checker/
     │   │   ├── sources.cm
     │   │   └── checker.sml
     │   ├── contract_analyzer/
     │   │   ├── sources.cm
     │   │   └── analyzer.sml
     │   ├── ir/
     │   │   ├── sources.cm
     │   │   ├── ir.sml          (IR datatypes)
     │   │   └── lowering.sml    (AST -> IR)
     │   ├── backend/
     │   │   └── c/
     │   │       ├── sources.cm
     │   │       └── codegen.sml (IR -> C source)
     │   └── error/
     │       ├── sources.cm
     │       ├── span.sml        (source location tracking)
     │       └── reporter.sml    (error message formatting)
     └── test/
         ├── sources.cm
         └── test_runner.sml

     create the CM files and stub SML files.

/run: 01-create-scaffolding.sh

## step 2: build system

/ai: create a Makefile or build script that:
     - compiles sv0c using SML/NJ's CM
     - runs the test suite
     - produces a heap image for fast startup
     - cleans build artifacts

/run: 02-create-build-script.sh

## validation

/assert: test -f $SV0C_ROOT/sources.cm
/assert: test -f $SRC_DIR/main.sml
/run: 03-verify-build.sh
